series_metadata.series_description: Tax return and related documentation, including Jenkins Act records, pay-in reports, and correspondence, reporting cigarettes purchased for use, storage, or other consumption in this state upon which the excise tax had not been previously paid.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 3 yrs end of calendar year or time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: 3 yrs end of calendar year or time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
